headline: 9 Stocks to Buy If Oil Is the New Gold
summary: The Iran war will lead to sustained higher oil prices. Jefferies recommends buying nine stocks to profit.

raw.headline: 9 Stocks to Buy If Oil Is the New Gold
raw.summary: The Iran war will lead to sustained higher oil prices. Jefferies recommends buying nine stocks to profit.

headline: 'Basra Oil Company Manager Says Iraq Can Restore Oil Exports To 3.4M Barrels Per Day Within A Week If Hormuz Shipping Resumes,; Iraq Has Yet To Receive Any Written Assurances To Allow Tankers To Pass Through Strait Of Hormuz; Drone Attacks On Southern Oilfields Have Caused Major Disruption To Iraq Oil Output And Operations; Drone Attack On Rumaila Field Hit Sites Used By U.S. Oilfield Services Companies Schlumberger, Baker Hughes' - Reuters Exclusive
summary: Iraq has had to reduce oil production by around 80%Storage has filled up as Strait of Hormuz closure prevented exportsIraq produces more oil than it exports, giving it scope to increase exports even if some capacity
